params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-16 line decoder with an enable input, generating a one-hot output vector of 16 bits. When the enable signal (EN) is HIGH, the output (Q) is set to zero; when EN is LOW, the two possible values of the 2-bit select input (SEL) determine which one of the two corresponding 8-bit outputs is activated, which in turn drives one of the 16 output bits in Q to HIGH, while all others remain LOW.
